_note: Source of truth for the Growth Northstar dashboard. Substack pulls live via RSS. IG + TikTok refresh via scripts/refresh-metrics.mjs (run by .github/workflows/refresh-metrics.yml on a 6h schedule) when account tokens are configured as repo secrets. LinkedIn personal-profile followers are manual only — there's no public API for them.
_statusNote: Each channel has a `status` field: 'active' means we're investing time/effort here this quarter; 'passive' means the account exists but isn't a focus. Active channels drive the Northstar reach total; passive ones are tracked separately.

platformFocus._note: Top-level summary of where the team is currently focused. Update this when priorities shift.

Spring is loading slowly.
Only one way to get through a big session is to spice it up a little bit.
One of the biggest myths about run clubs is that you need to be a true athlete to join. Most sessions are designed to accommodate runners of all skill levels with no mandatory speed requirements.
What are you up to this weekend?

Get ready to run and munch! 🍕

We are partnering with @rareform030 to help fuel you for the half marathon next weekend! Come run our slow paced 5km and enjoy pizza in the park afterwards from @cheerskiezpizza
